task: The blacksmith forged the sword from the iron. It became a treasured family heirloom.
Walter offered Edgar a ride home. He gratefully accepted after the long workday.
The lighthouse warned ships of the rocky coast. It had stood there for over a century.
implementations: The pronoun "It" refers to "the rocky coast".

task: Lucy comforted Naomi after the bad news. She had been crying for over an hour.
The boy threw the stone into the pond. It made ripples across the still water.
Theodore lent Albert his notes. He had prepared them carefully for the upcoming examination.
The wind blew the leaf off the branch. It drifted slowly toward the wet ground.
Audrey introduced Cynthia to the team. She came highly recommended by previous colleagues.
The teacher read the story to the children. It captured their attention from the very first page.
